scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (products, orders, customers, categories); the full ShopWired surface (product variations, options, extras, webhooks, order creation) is out of scope until Pass B. ShopWired is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented product creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented order updates; Pass B capability expansion
